title: Build media processing pipeline
description: No media processing exists. Need: validate image MIME type by sniffing magic bytes (not trusting extension), enforce 10MB max file size, strip EXIF metadata, compute blurhash, store processed image in data_dir/media/, insert post_media row. Add dependencies: image crate for resize/EXIF, blurhash crate. This blocks --media CLI flag and webhook media fetch.
